verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — treatment 'skill_stream_share' has no within-country variation under country fixed effects
verdict_reason: treatment 'skill_stream_share' has no within-country variation under country fixed effects
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if Australia's foreign-born/native employment-rate gap is < 2pp on average 2000-2023, AND the cross-country panel shows skill-stream-share negatively correlated with the gap at p<0.05. REFUTED if Australian gap > 4pp or skill-stream coefficient insignificant/wrong-signed.

estimate.error: treatment 'skill_stream_share' has no within-country variation under country fixed effects

variables_loaded.name: skill_stream_share
variables_loaded.source: constructed: AUS skill-stream share of permanent migration from DHA (Department of Home Affairs) annual program reports.
